notes_for_human_reviewer: OFFICE-BRAIN FAILURE MODE — coordinating a distributed team as if it were co-located. Adds a DAILY all-hands call ('talk things through properly like we would in an office'), settles the decision and the IdP/MFA scope verbally, and explicitly refuses to write the decision down ('I won't bother writing the IdP decision up'). async_with_context, meeting_judgment, and written_memory all floor at 1. And it consciously keeps the 2am slot on Toronto 'for consistency' — timezone_fairness floors at 1 — even acknowledging it's early for them and doing it anyway. human_layer 2 (a throwaway 'I know it's early your end', but no real attention; Arjun unmentioned). Tests whether the grader catches the confident-but-wrong co-located approach as the failure it is for a three-zone team.
